mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM excel_down_log a JOIN teach b ON a.teach_idx = b.teach_idx WHERE 1=1
AND type = #{type}
AND a.${search_type} LIKE '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
AND b.${search_type} LIKE '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
AND a.add_date >= to_date(#{start_date},'yyyy-mm-dd')
AND a.add_date <= to_date(#{end_date},'yyyy-mm-dd')+1

SELECT a.add_id, a.os, a.browser, a.ip, to_char(a.add_date,'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') as add_date, a.type, b.teach_idx, b.teach_name, a.site_id, c.homepage_name FROM excel_down_log a, teach b, cms_homepage c WHERE a.teach_idx = b.teach_idx AND a.site_id = c.homepage_id
AND a.type = #{type}
AND a.${search_type} LIKE '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
AND b.${search_type} LIKE '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
AND a.add_date >= to_date(#{start_date},'yyyy-mm-dd')
AND a.add_date <= to_date(#{end_date},'yyyy-mm-dd')+1
ORDER BY a.add_date DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(idx),0)+1 FROM EXCEL_DOWN_REASON_LOG
INSERT INTO EXCEL_DOWN_REASON_LOG ( idx, homepage_id, excel_down_reason, add_id, add_ip, add_date, menu_path, type ) VALUES ( #{idx}, #{homepage_id}, #{excel_down_reason}, #{add_id}, #{ip}, sysdate, #{menu_url}, #{type} )
mapper.select: SELECT idx, homepage_id, excel_down_reason, add_id, add_ip, TO_CHAR(add_date,'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') as add_date, menu_path, type, (SELECT B.homepage_name FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE B WHERE B.homepage_id = A.homepage_id AND ROWNUM = 1) AS homepage_name FROM EXCEL_DOWN_REASON_LOG A WHERE idx = #{idx}
